title: selenipedium × baconis var. edithae
intro: Selenipedium × baconis var. edithae is a rare and unique orchid plant that is a natural hybrid of two species of selenipedium orchids. It is known to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of selenipedium × baconis var. edithae include its ability to soothe coughs, relieve congestion, and protect against infections. Traditionally, this plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief to those suffering from respiratory ailments.
